## Change

Describe the user or research outcome.

## Evidence and controls

- [ ] Claims are no broader than cited evidence.
- [ ] Protocol changes include sham/control and failure criteria.
- [ ] No participant data, secrets, or paid services were added.
- [ ] Spanish and English surfaces remain aligned.
- [ ] Lint, typecheck, unit tests, and build pass.
- [ ] Safety, privacy, and zero-cost impact were reviewed.
